title.highest: Top Directors by Highest Movie Rating

directors_grid.points_explanation: A director's rating is calculated from movies rated 3.0 and above: each rating is raised to the fourth power, then the values are summed, the total is rounded, and divided by 10. Formula: (x₁⁴ + x₂⁴ + x₃⁴ + ...)/10. Raising ratings to the fourth power makes highly rated films influence the result much more strongly.
